{"code":"(def sentry-issues (sentry_issues))

; Filter for unresolved issues and find the one with highest event count
(def unresolved (filter #(= (:status %) "unresolved") sentry-issues))
(def top-issue (apply max-key :count unresolved))

; Get the exact title
(def title (:title top-issue))

; Send the email
